poc.heroKicker: Ship copy like you ship features.
poc.heroLede: Same JSON shape as dcx-client-app—prove the GitHub → Lokalise → runtime loop here before you touch prod.
poc.cardPipelineCaption: If it fits on a napkin, your translators can reason about it. If it does not, fix the product first.
poc.cardFiltersHint: Every line below is a real key. Edit JSON, let Lokalise pull, refresh—watch the DOM obey.
poc.cardErrorHint: Config errors should sound human in every language—not like cold leftovers from another era.
poc.footerLine: Darwin CX · Built to fail safely in staging, not in your sprint demo.
